title: rubus macrostachys var. laevefactus
intro: Rubus macrostachys var. laevefactus, also known as the smooth-bracted raspberry or smooth-leaved raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus macrostachys plant, a type of thorny shrub in the rose family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus macrostachys var. laevefactus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
